input_dict.question: Between Jason Bateman and Jan Troell, which filmmaker has had a more diverse career?
input_dict.source_summary: Jason Bateman has had the more diverse career. He has worked as an actor, director, and producer across TV, film, and voice work; Jan Troell is primarily a Swedish film director/writer/cinematographer.
input_dict.target_summary: Integrated summary: Jason Bateman has had a multifaceted career—working as an actor, director, and producer across television, film, and voice roles (from the first-hop summary). Jan Gustaf Troell (born 23 July 1931) is a Swedish film director (supported by the retrieved Jan Troell document). These retained facts (Bateman's multiple on-screen and behind-the-camera roles; Troell identified as a Swedish film director) provide the evidence needed to assess which filmmaker has had a more diverse career.
